{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Archmage of that spell
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator was an [[Archmage]] of the [[Mirror of Silence]] spell.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
